Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}To think there would be a bastion of commerce within a house of academia...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Could you please wait here for a moment? There's something I've been curious about for a while...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Excuse me, I would like to purchase a "school lunch."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}They don't deal in school lunches here...? How disappointing.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}I would have liked a taste of this "school lunch," as it is a rare delicacy only served in select facilities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Well, in that case, I shall order some bread. I've heard that having bread for lunch is part of the school experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I would have liked a taste of this "school lunch," as it is a rare delicacy only served in select facilities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}But I've heard that having bread for lunch is also part of the school experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Now that I've checked that off the list, let us proceed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 202 0 25 25}As for where I'd like to go next... Shall we visit your homeroom?[n]{f 1 1}
